description_long: This kiosk features a modern, open-front design with a prominent black and teal color scheme. The front area includes a service counter, several round tables with chairs, and a back wall adorned with three landscape display screens and a row of colorful decorative objects. The left side is mostly solid teal, while the right side incorporates a vertical black-striped accent and a small overhanging sign. The roof is flat and black, extending slightly over the front and sides, with bold signage for branding. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from metal and composite panels, with plastic or laminate furnishings and glass display screens. The open layout is designed for customer interaction and casual seating, making it suitable for urban environments such as malls, plazas, or exhibition spaces.
description: A modern, open-front kiosk with a black and teal color scheme, featuring a service counter, tables, display screens, and bold signage. The design emphasizes customer interaction and visual branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open service area, tables, chairs, display screens, and prominent signage above.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the solid teal wall and the depth of the kiosk structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a mostly solid teal wall with minimal features and no visible entry points.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the overhanging sign, black-striped accent, and arrangement of tables and counter.
attribute_signage_type: Printed and illuminated signage with 'LOGO NAME!!' above the entrance, 'LOGO' on the overhanging side panel, and 'LOGO' on the front counter; all integrated into the structure.
attribute_door_configuration: Open archway entrance at the front; no visible doors.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof in black with slight overhangs on the front and sides; no skylights or decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with clean lines, bold color blocking, and functional open layout.
